---
title: "Open Data Regensburg"
description: "Mapping public infrastructure in the city of Regensburg: drinking fountains, decorative fountains, and glass recycling containers."
image: thumbnail.jpg
categories: [R, Open Data, Geospatial]
---

## About

Three of the City of Regensburg's open point datasets — drinking fountains, glass recycling
containers and ornamental fountains — are harmonised to a common WGS84 GeoJSON form and
assigned to the city's statistical districts by point-in-polygon. The analysis then evaluates
each district's provision and the metadata quality of the source data. The workflow is fully
reproducible: the same inputs yield the same map and tables every time.

## Stack

[R]{.badge-skill} [sf]{.badge-skill} [Open Data]{.badge-skill} [Geospatial]{.badge-skill}
